'''Dragon-birds''' or '''dragon birds''' were avian predators indigenous to [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] and [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. Those of Endor were considered a bad omen by [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]]. Those of Onderon inspired the appearance of [[dragon-bird robot drone]]s. The dragon-birds on the two worlds may have been separate species sharing nothing more than a name.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]] {{Mo}}
*[[Ewoks (1985) 9|''Ewoks'' (1985) 9]] {{1st}}
